title: Horseradish Crunchy Delight
description: A nutty and crumbly post-workout dish featuring horseradish, marinated in a blend of plant-based-friendly ingredients for added flavor.
instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine horseradish powder with mayonnaise, apple cider vinegar, and enough water to achieve the desired consistency.
Mix well until you reach a creamy consistency. Let it marinate for at least 30 minutes or up to an hour before use.
Once the marinade is ready, add crushed sunflower seeds and chopped almonds. Mix gently to combine.
Fold in mashed avocado and fresh parsley leaves until everything is evenly distributed.
Transfer the mixture into a serving dish and chill for at least 30 minutes before serving.
